reviews.comment:
Está en el lugar justo de la ruta. En pleno campo. Un lugar muy tranquilo con sanitarios limpios y buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
It's right on the route. In the middle of the countryside. A very quiet place with clean restrooms and good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURhdTZIYTVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar los playeros muy serviciales muy buena jente a parte dispones de mesas bajo la sombra y hamacas para los chicos para recrearse para luego seguir asiendo ruta , si es en moto como mi wave mucho mejor!!! 🤤🤤🤤🤤🤤💪💪💪👋👋👋

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place, the beach staff are very helpful, very good people, and you have tables under the shade and hammocks for the kids to relax and then continue on the route, if it is by motorcycle like my wave, much better!!! 🤤🤤🤤🤤🤤💪💪💪👋👋👋
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURhbmZMTS1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene árboles y un lugar con mesas a un costado para descansar. Baños limpios. Estacionamiento. Un poco lento el servicio. Tardan 200 años en cargar. Mucha cola. No paro más acá.

(Translated by Google)
It has trees and a picnic area with tables to the side for resting. Clean restrooms. Parking. The service is a bit slow. It takes forever to load. Long lines. I won't stop here again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTcFp6cFRBEAE
